reviews.title: Nice, breathable, MENS shoe!
reviews.text: Well first off, my bad, I didn't realize it was a MANS shoe, but no matter. It IS a good enough looking shoe. The laces are different than I've seen, before. They don't " tighten" up like regular. The back flap rubber makes them a little longer ..you see this on a lot of the newer styles. They fit, but the outer shoe is longer, maybe for balance and traction. But the back of your shoe catches on stairs, and trips you up. I almost fell down only once. Need to build fatter  stairs or buy smaller shoes 🙂

O cabedal possui uma gaiola média laminada para fornecer suporte e estabilidade e uma palmilha OrthoLite® garante que seus pés fiquem confortáveis durante todo dia. 我们的 GEL-Contend™ 4 适合者,的和的合性。 面用中,和性,而 ortholite® 保您的保适适。 我的 GEL-Contend™ 4 合者,的和美合。 面用中型,和性,而 ortholite® 可保您的保。 جل المحتويات ™ 4 ¦ , ortholite® Be a force to Contend with in this sleek running shoe from ASICS. In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." title: ASICS Gel-Quantum 180 4 Women's Running Shoe
description: Direct inspiration taken from GEL-SUPER QUANTUM. QUANTUM 180 tooling for all day comfort. TRUSSTIC SYSTEM technology reduces the weight of the sole unit while retaining the structural integrity of the shoe. Synthetic-and-mesh Rubber sole Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle. Seamless Construction - The use of seamless materials reduces the potential for irritation and friction caused by traditional stitches and seams. Trusstic System technology - Reduces the weight of the sole unit while retaining the structural integrity of the shoe. Solyte Midsole Material - A lighter weight midsole compound than ASICS standard EVA and SpEVA midsoles. Also features enhanced cushioning and durability. Ortholite Lasting - This lasting material features plush underfoot comfort while providing excellent moisture management and a high level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of ATP Manufacturing LLC.)

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 20 Women's Running Shoe
description: The Gel-Nimbus 20 shoe has a flexible vertical groove that decouples tools along the progression line to improve gait efficiency. The exoskeletal heel counterweight provides improved support and creates an improved heel fitment environment. It has a gel cushioning system for rear hind and forefoot, that reduces the impact during the detachment phases and allows the movement on several levels while the foot passes through the step cycle.The material of the speva midsole improves the characteristics of rebound and reduces midsole breakage. It has a new blown ahar outsole that offers advanced cushioning, durability and foot stroke, in addition it is built with the innovative midsole foam, flytefoam. Its organic fibers bounce metarun provide a perfect cushioning from the beginning of the stroke to the end.It is designed with a 3 m reflective material, for visibility. Textile and Synthetic Imported Rubber sole Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch FLYTEFOAM MIDSOLE TECHNOLOGY Our FlyteFoam technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams. FLUIDRIDE MIDSOLE: ASICS FluidRide midsole provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.

title: OLUKAI Men's Sneaker
description: The easiest boat shoe. Made with no-tie laces and breathable materials that are perfect for life by the water. Translation: Handsome (noh-heh-ah moh-koo) Made to elevate the traditional boat shoe, we crafted the handsome Nohea Moku with an adventurous life in mind. Sure-footed and down for any outdoor exploration, the no-tie laces and stretch bootie construction for barefoot wear yield a shoe that’s ready for land or water. Rubber sole THE ULTIMATE ADVENTURE SHOE: Made to elevate the traditional boat shoe, we crafted the handsome Nohea Moku men’s shoe with an adventurous life in mind. Sure-footed and down for any outdoor exploration, the no-tie laces and stretch bootie construction for barefoot wear yield a shoe that’s ready for land or water. 2-IN-1 SHOE & SLIDE: The Nohea Moku features our patented Drop-In Heel design for both a shoe and slide functionality where the heel can be folded down for slip-on convenience, and a stretch bootie construction for barefoot wear. These no tie boat shoes feature a lightweight breathable mesh design with a stretch air mesh tongue and gusset, elastic lacing system for easy on/off use, medial water drainage ports and are minimally lined with a soft breathable microfiber. ALL-DAY COMFORT: The dual-density anatomical PU footbed with gel insert delivers sustained all-day comfort and cushioning, while the soft, quick-drying jersey knit or single mesh layer footbed cover allows for maximum breathability, and is removable and washable. LIGHTWEIGHT, DURABLE & STYLISH: Our Nohea Moku shoe features an all-weather, non-marking rubber cupsole with added traction on wet surfaces and non-slip safety. Available in mens shoe size 7 - 16.
